info.title: Bithumb API
info.description: Bithumb is South Korea's leading cryptocurrency exchange. This API provides access to market data, trading, and account management. It includes both the legacy public API and the newer v1 API endpoints.

get.description: Returns the current price information for the specified trading pair. Use ALL as order_currency to get all tickers.

parameters.name: order_currency
parameters.description: Order currency symbol (e.g., BTC, ETH, XRP) or ALL for all currencies.

get.description: Returns the current orderbook (bids and asks) for the specified trading pair.

parameters.name: order_currency
parameters.description: Order currency symbol (e.g., BTC, ETH, XRP) or ALL.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of orderbook entries to return (1-30, default 30).

get.description: Returns the most recent completed transactions for the specified trading pair.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of transactions to return (1-100, default 20).

get.description: Returns a list of all available trading markets with their Korean and English names.

parameters.name: isDetails
parameters.description: Whether to include detailed market information.

get.description: Returns minute-interval candle (OHLCV) data for the specified market.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End time in yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss format (UTC). Returns most recent if omitted.

get.description: Returns daily candle (OHLCV) data for the specified market.
Returns weekly candle (OHLCV) data for the specified market.
Returns monthly candle (OHLCV) data for the specified market.
Returns a list of the most recent trades for the specified market.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Last trade sequential ID for pagination.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of trade ticks to return.

get.description: Returns current price information for the specified market.

parameters.name: markets
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of market codes (e.g., KRW-BTC,KRW-ETH).

get.description: Returns the current orderbook for the specified market(s).

parameters.name: markets
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of market codes (e.g., KRW-BTC).

get.description: Returns a list of all accounts/balances for the authenticated user.
Returns information on whether the user can place an order for the given market, including available balance and fee rates.
Returns details for a specific order by UUID or client_order_id.
Returns a list of orders for the authenticated user, with optional filtering.

post.description: Places a new buy or sell order on the specified market.

delete.description: Cancels a pending order by UUID or client_order_id.

post.description: Places multiple orders in a single request.
Cancels multiple orders in a single request.

uuids.description: List of order UUIDs to cancel.

get.description: Returns a list of cryptocurrency withdrawals.
Returns a list of KRW (Korean Won) withdrawals.

post.description: Submits a Korean Won withdrawal request.

get.description: Returns a list of assets flagged with warnings (e.g., investment caution notices).
Returns a list of recent exchange announcements and notices.

bearerAuth.description: JWT authentication token. Private API endpoints require a JWT generated using your API access key and secret key. The token payload must include the access_key, nonce (UUID v4), and for endpoints with query parameters, a query_hash (SHA-512 of the query string).

opening_price.description: Opening price for the current day.

units_traded.description: Volume traded during the current day.

acc_trade_value.description: Accumulated trade value for the day.

units_traded_24H.description: Volume traded in the last 24 hours.

acc_trade_value_24H.description: Accumulated trade value for the last 24 hours.

fluctate_24H.description: Price change in the last 24 hours.

fluctate_rate_24H.description: Price change rate (%) in the last 24 hours.

candle_acc_trade_price.description: Accumulated trade price for the candle.

candle_acc_trade_volume.description: Accumulated trade volume for the candle.

avg_buy_price_modified.description: Whether the average buy price has been modified.

unit_currency.description: Unit currency for the average buy price.

ord_type.description: Order type: limit, price (market buy by total), market (market sell).

price.description: Order price (for limit orders) or total amount (for price orders).

volume.description: Order volume. Required for limit and market sell orders.

price.description: Order price. Required for limit orders. For 'price' type orders, this is the total KRW amount.

ord_type.description: Order type: limit (limit order), price (market buy by total amount), market (market sell).

client_order_id.description: Optional client-defined order ID for tracking.

tags.name: Public - Legacy
tags.description: Legacy public API endpoints (api.bithumb.com/public/). No authentication required.

tags.name: Public - v1
tags.description: V1 public API endpoints. No authentication required.

tags.name: Private
tags.description: Private API endpoints requiring JWT authentication.

tags.name: Private - v2
tags.description: V2 private API endpoints with batch operations.
